title: From idea to production: bridging design systems and code with AI
speakers: Abdullah Alkhatib (Principal Designer, Mercari, Inc.), Motoki Narita (VP of Product Engineering (Marketplace), Mercari, Inc.), Marcel Weekes (VP, Product Engineering, Figma)
key_points: AI can convert ideas, sketches, and screenshots into UI, but the abstract argues that without design systems these outputs remain prototypes rather than shippable products.
The talk's central thesis: connecting AI-generated output to existing design system components is what turns it into real, production-ready code rather than throwaway mockups.
The Mercari team shares concrete workflows and lessons learned from bridging design systems and code with AI.
Mercari reports that this approach doubled development speed while also improving quality.
